items.title: Caching Strategies
items.description: Cache patterns, eviction policies, Redis deep dive, cache invalidation strategies, and common pitfalls like cache stampede and cache penetration.

items.title: Caching Strategies
items.description: In-depth guide to caching strategies including cache-aside, write-through, write-behind, eviction policies, cache stampede prevention, Redis data structures, and multi-level caching.

items.title: NoSQL & Distributed Databases
items.description: Key-value, document, wide-column, and graph databases — their models, trade-offs, and when to choose each.

items.title: Scaling Reads
items.description: Strategies for handling high read QPS including caching layers, read replicas, CDN, CQRS, and database indexing. Covers Redis patterns, cache invalidation, and fan-out strategies.
